stakeholders.inference_basis: Brief: 'residential customers can view their monthly bills and pay them online by debit or credit card'.

stakeholders.role: Customer support agent handling disputes and lockouts
stakeholders.inference_basis: Brief: 'the customer support team takes over payment disputes, failed payments, and account-lockout tickets raised through the portal'.
Brief: 'card payments are processed through an external payment gateway vendor'.
Brief: 'the CFO is funding the initiative and expects it to cut call-center payment handling by half within a year of launch'.
Brief: 'paper billing continues for customers who do not enroll; the portal must not degrade service for offline customers'.
